description: Establish multi-tenancy in the 'local' cluster by grouping the namespaces marketing-site, marketing-analytics, sales-api, and sales-db into two new Rancher Projects named 'Marketing Hub' and 'Sales Core'. Apply Project Resource Quotas to both projects according to the governance specification on the desktop, ensuring all existing workloads are preserved. Rancher credentials: https://localhost, admin / Admin12345678!
